title: Create Train Utilities
description: Create Addon that adds custom sliding doors with realistic opening & closing sounds, platform blocks and building blocks for stations and trains.
body:
## Create Train Utilities Please also take a look at my other mods: * [Create Train Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-train-lights) * [Create More Seats](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-seats) Create Addon that adds custom sliding doors with realistic opening & closing sounds, platform blocks and building blocks for stations and trains. ## Dependencies - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) / [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) ## Features ### Overview Video
### New sliding doors
... and MORE!
### Platform Blocks
... and MORE!
### More Features - Opening & Closing sounds - auto closing doors - doors can be controlled on all carriages - and more! ## Languages - English - German - Spanish (by Timanfour, AlbertoSaurio) - Czech (by Panzimy) - Russian (by Best-Jaro) - French (by Alba0404) - Chinese (by Jim139129) ## Important! You should always back up your world before installing a mod update to protect your world from damage. ## Support me If you want to support me and my work, check out my Ko-fi Page ❤️ * [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/adeptstack_programmerlp) ## Credits [Credits](https://github.com/ProgrammerLP/Create-Trainutilities/wiki/Credits)
